meaning: n.牛头犬,摔倒,左轮手枪v.摔牛
examples: Whispered the little wretch, rousing a half-bred bulldog from its lair in a corner.
The other names of this dog are Chinese pug, Dutch bulldog, Dutch mastiff and Mini mastiff and its country of origin is China.
On the bulldog ant of Australia.
The Bulldog Bash biker event in south Warwickshire has been cancelled this year, organisers have said.
Gate's chief bulldog, Steve Ballmer, could run the OS company leaving Bill with the applications side.
